evals.prompt: We're a time-tracking tool for agencies. We want to start a content marketing program but have no content yet and can only publish 2 posts per month. Where do we start?
evals.expected_output: Should not overwhelm with a 50-post plan. Should recommend 3 content pillars appropriate for agencies researching time tracking. Should create a 90-day editorial calendar with 6 posts. Should apply the topic cluster model. Should prioritize by SEO opportunity given resource constraints. Should provide a simple production workflow for 2 posts per month.
